meta_title: Store Website Builder — No Code | Promto
meta_description: Store website builder: create an online store with catalog, cart, and payment without programmers. Fast and free on Promto.
h1: Store Website Builder — Create Without Code
og_description: Specialized builder for online stores. Catalog, cart, payment, and delivery. Create a store without code on Promto.
hero_title: Store Website Builder — Create Without Code
hero_subtitle: Everything needed for online sales in one builder — from catalog to payment.
hero_placeholder: Describe the website for your business...

advantages.title: Store Specialization
advantages.description: Ready-made blocks for catalog, product cards, cart, and checkout — no setup from scratch.

advantages.title: Built-in Commerce
advantages.description: Online payment, inventory management, shipping calculation — everything works out of the box.

advantages.title: Flexible Catalog
advantages.description: Create categories, add filters and product variants for any assortment.

advantages.title: E-commerce SEO
advantages.description: Automatic meta tags for products and categories, structured Schema.org data.

advantages.title: Speed to Launch
advantages.description: Describe the store — AI generates the design and structure. Edit in the visual editor.

advantages.title: Sales Analytics
advantages.description: Track conversion, popular products, and traffic sources in one dashboard.

how_it_works.title: Describe Your Store
how_it_works.description: Specify what you're selling — the builder will create suitable structure and design.

how_it_works.title: Configure Products and Payment
how_it_works.description: Add products, select a payment system, and configure delivery conditions.

how_it_works.title: Launch the Store
how_it_works.description: Publish and promote — the builder scales with your business.

faq.question: How does a store builder differ from a universal one?
faq.answer: E-commerce blocks are built in: cart, payment, order management — no need to configure everything separately.

faq.question: Can I import products from a spreadsheet?
faq.answer: Yes, upload Excel or CSV with products — they'll appear in the catalog automatically.

faq.question: Does the builder support multiple currencies?
faq.answer: Yes, multi-currency support is available on paid plans for selling in different countries.

faq.question: Is there a mobile app for store management?
faq.answer: Manage the store via mobile browser — the editor is smartphone-adapted.

faq.question: How much does the store builder cost?
faq.answer: Free plan to start. Extended catalog and commercial features on paid plans.

faq.question: Can I use my own domain?
faq.answer: Yes, connect your own domain in settings — available on all paid plans.

cta_mid_subtitle: Create an online store in 5 minutes — no code and no developers.
cta_final_subtitle: Launch an online store for free on the Promto builder.
